docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SEAN MCNALLY OR DEFENDANT MICHEL SINCLAIR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
REMARK: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO SEAN MCNALLY ON 08/18/16 RETURNED BY USPS LABELED "RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,614.95 FILED BY MCNALLY, SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT SINCLAIR, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
